title: Two Sum
content: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

title: LRU Cache
content: Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.

title: Number of Islands
content: Given an m x n 2D binary grid grid which represents a map of '1's (land) and '0's (water), return the number of islands.

title: Merge Intervals
content: Merge all overlapping intervals, and return an array of the non-overlapping intervals.

title: Trapping Rain Water
content: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
content: Return the maximum profit you can achieve from a single stock transaction.

title: Word Ladder II
content: Find all shortest transformation sequences from beginWord to endWord.

title: Maximum Subarray
content: Find the contiguous subarray which has the largest sum and return its sum.

title: K Closest Points to Origin
content: Return the k closest points to the origin (0, 0) on a 2D plane.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
content: Given two sorted arrays, return the median of the two sorted arrays.

title: Next Permutation
content: Rearrange numbers into the lexicographically next greater permutation of numbers.

title: Reverse Linked List
content: Reverse a singly linked list.

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
content: Search for a target value in a rotated sorted array.

title: Coin Change
content: Return the fewest number of coins that you need to make up that amount.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
content: Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
content: Given the root of a binary tree, return the level order traversal of its nodes' values.

title: Word Break
content: Return true if s can be segmented into a space-separated sequence of dictionary words.

title: Maximum Product Subarray
content: Find a contiguous non-empty subarray within an array that has the largest product.

title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
content: Find the minimum element in a sorted and rotated array.

title: Decode Ways
content: Given a string s containing only digits, return the number of ways to decode it.

title: Shortest Path in Weighted Grid
content: Implement Dijkstra's algorithm to find the minimum cost path in a directed weighted graph.

title: Stock Maximization with Fees
content: Find the maximum profit achievable from trading stocks given a transaction fee.

title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
content: Find the minimal length of a contiguous subarray of which the sum is greater than or equal to target.

title: Group Anagrams
content: Group a list of strings into anagrams.

title: Spiral Matrix
content: Return all elements of a matrix in spiral order.

title: Valid Parentheses
content: Determine if the input string has valid brackets.

title: Climbing Stairs
content: Find the number of distinct ways to climb to the top of a staircase.

title: Edit Distance
content: Find the minimum number of operations required to convert word1 to word2.

title: Course Schedule
content: Determine if you can finish all courses given prerequisite pairs (Topological Sort).

title: Longest Palindromic Substring
content: Return the longest palindromic substring in s.

title: Sort Colors
content: Sort an array of 0s, 1s, and 2s in-place (Dutch National Flag algorithm).

title: Merge k Sorted Lists
content: Merge k sorted linked lists and return it as one sorted list.

title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
content: Find the lowest common ancestor (LCA) of two given nodes in the tree.

title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
content: Design an algorithm to serialize and deserialize a binary tree.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
content: Find the maximum path sum of any non-empty path in a binary tree.

title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
content: Construct a binary tree given its preorder and inorder traversals.

title: Validate Binary Search Tree
content: Determine if a valid binary search tree (BST) is formed.

title: Kth Smallest Element in a BST
content: Find the kth smallest value (1-indexed) of all the values of the nodes in the tree.

title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
content: Implement the Trie class with insert, search, and startsWith methods.

title: Add and Search Word
content: Design a data structure that supports adding new words and finding if a string matches any previously added string.

title: Sliding Window Maximum
content: Return the max sliding window array.

title: Minimum Window Substring
content: Return the minimum window substring of s such that every character in t is included in the window.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
content: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

title: Find Median from Data Stream
content: Design a data structure that calculates the median of all elements.

title: Copy List with Random Pointer
content: Construct a deep copy of a linked list with random pointers.

title: Linked List Cycle
content: Determine if a linked list has a cycle in it.

title: Intersection of Two Linked Lists
content: Return the node at which the two linked lists intersect.

title: Palindrome Linked List
content: Determine if a linked list is a palindrome.

title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
content: Remove the nth node from the end of the list and return its head.

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
content: Merge two sorted linked lists into one.

title: Regular Expression Matching
content: Implement regular expression matching with support for '.' and '*'.

title: Container With Most Water
content: Find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container, such that the container contains the most water.

title: 3Sum
content: Find all unique triplets in the array which gives the sum of zero.

title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
content: Return all possible letter combinations that the number could represent.

title: Word Search II
content: Given an m x n board of characters and a list of strings words, return all words on the board.

title: Evaluate Division
content: Evaluate query equations given a list of string variable pairs and their real number values.

title: Decode String
content: Decode an encoded string where k[encoded_string] means it is repeated k times.

title: Diameter of Binary Tree
content: Compute the length of the diameter of the tree.

title: Bulls and Cows
content: Play the Bulls and Cows game and return the hint string.

title: Longest Continuous Subarray With Absolute Diff Less Than or Equal to Limit
content: Find the size of the longest continuous subarray such that the absolute difference between any two elements is less than or equal to limit.

title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
content: Find the kth largest element in an unsorted array.

title: Find Peak Element
content: Find a peak element and return its index.

title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
content: Evaluate the value of an arithmetic expression in Reverse Polish Notation.

title: Clone Graph
content: Return a deep copy of a connected undirected graph.

title: Course Schedule II
content: Find the ordering of courses you should take to finish all courses.

title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
content: Find the list of grid coordinates where water can flow to both the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

title: Number of Provinces
content: Find the total number of connected component provinces.

title: Redundant Connection
content: Return an edge that can be removed to make the graph a tree.

title: Cheapest Flights Within K Stops
content: Find the cheapest price from src to dst with up to k stops.

title: Word Search
content: Given an m x n grid of characters board and a string word, return true if word exists in the grid.

title: N-Queens
content: Place n queens on an n x n chessboard such that no two queens attack each other.

title: Sudoku Solver
content: Write a program to solve a Sudoku puzzle by filling the empty cells.

title: Combination Sum
content: Find all unique combinations in candidates where the candidate numbers sum to target.

title: Permutations
content: Given an array of distinct integers, return all the possible permutations.

title: Subsets
content: Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets.

title: Generate Parentheses
content: Given n pairs of parentheses, write a function to generate all combinations of well-formed parentheses.

title: Palindrome Partitioning
content: Partition s such that every substring of the partition is a palindrome.

title: Minimum Path Sum
content: Find a path from top left to bottom right, which minimizes the sum of all numbers along its path.

title: Jump Game
content: Determine if you are able to reach the last index.

title: Jump Game II
content: Find the minimum number of jumps to reach the last index.

title: Fizz Buzz
content: Return a string array representing the FizzBuzz sequence.

title: Reverse String
content: Reverse an array of characters in-place.

title: Single Number
content: Find the single element that appears only once in an array where every other element appears twice.

title: Majority Element
content: Find the majority element that appears more than n/2 times.

title: Missing Number
content: Return the only number in the range that is missing from the array.

title: Move Zeroes
content: Move all 0's to the end of the array while maintaining the relative order of the non-zero elements.

title: Intersection of Two Arrays
content: Compute the intersection of two arrays.

title: Valid Anagram
content: Determine if string t is an anagram of string s.

title: Contains Duplicate
content: Return true if any value appears at least twice in the array.

title: Excel Sheet Column Number
content: Given a string columnTitle that represents the column title as appear in an Excel sheet, return its corresponding column number.

title: Longest Common Prefix
content: Find the longest common prefix string amongst an array of strings.

title: Valid Palindrome
content: Determine if a string is a valid palindrome, ignoring cases and non-alphanumeric characters.

title: Find the Index of the First Occurrence in a String
content: Return the index of the first occurrence of needle in haystack, or -1 if needle is not part of haystack.

title: String to Integer (atoi)
content: Implement the myAtoi(string s) function, which converts a string to a 32-bit signed integer.

title: Add Binary
content: Given two binary strings a and b, return their sum as a binary string.

title: Multiply Strings
content: Given two non-negative integers represented as strings, return the product.

title: Reverse Words in a String
content: Reverse the order of the words in a string.

title: Simplify Path
content: Convert an absolute Unix path to a simplified canonical path.

title: Length of Last Word
content: Return the length of the last word in the string.

title: Zigzag Conversion
content: Write the code that will take a string and make this zigzag conversion given a number of rows.

title: First Missing Positive
content: Find the smallest missing positive integer in an unsorted array.

title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
content: Find the area of largest rectangle in the histogram.

title: Maximal Rectangle
content: Find the largest rectangle containing only 1s and return its area in a 2D binary matrix.

title: Perfect Squares
content: Return the least number of perfect square numbers that sum to n.

title: House Robber
content: Determine the maximum amount of money you can rob tonight without alerting the police.

title: House Robber II
content: Determine the maximum amount of money you can rob from houses arranged in a circle.

title: House Robber III
content: Determine the maximum amount of money the thief can rob in a binary tree neighborhood.

title: Unique Paths
content: Find the number of possible unique paths from the top-left to the bottom-right of a grid.

title: Unique Paths II
content: Find the number of possible unique paths in a grid with obstacles.

title: Minimum Path Sum
content: Find a path from top left to bottom right, which minimizes the sum of all numbers along its path.
